comment: Pinned libmpv artifacts vendored by scripts/fetch-libmpv.mjs. Never point these at 'latest' — daily upstream builds have a history of silent regressions; bump deliberately and re-test playback before committing a new pin.

macos-aarch64.source: eko5624/mpv-mac (self-contained libmpv.2.dylib, ffmpeg statically linked, GPL)
